title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
summary_full: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.
summary_public: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war
